$description: Apollo Ecosystem - ULTRA MODULAR ARCHITECTURE - 32 Plugins (26 active + 6 planned) - COMPLETE REGISTRY

$header.IMPORTANT_runtime_alignment: MANDATORY: EVERY platform update MUST keep apollo-runtime aligned with all active plugins/contracts.
$header.CRITICAL_apollo_core_centralization: MANDATORY: ALL meta keys, CPTs, and taxonomies MUST be registered EXCLUSIVELY through apollo-core. NO direct register_post_meta/register_post_type/register_taxonomy calls anywhere else. apollo-core owns MASTER_REGISTRY + GLOBAL BRIDGE pattern.

pending_implementations: apollo-social: /follow/{user_id}, /unfollow/{user_id} - Follow/Unfollow endpoints (planned, not yet coded)
completed_recent: apollo-login: Full security hardening — 6 classes implemented (Firewall 7G, SecurityHeaders, WPHardening, RateLimiter, Lockout, URLRewriter)
apollo-login: Firewall 7G — SQL/XSS injection firewall, IP blacklist (permanent + transient), bad agent blocking, theme detector blocking, directory browsing block
apollo-login: SecurityHeaders — CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, removes X-Powered-By
apollo-login: WPHardening — removes WP generator meta, disables XML-RPC/oEmbed/embeds, blocks sensitive files (readme.html, wp-config.php, debug.log)
apollo-login: RateLimiter — IP-based rate limiting for logins, page loads, comment spam; auto-blacklists via Firewall on threshold exceeded
apollo-login: Lockout — user meta lockout (_apollo_lockout_until) + IP lockout (delegates to Firewall); AJAX admin unlock handlers
Platform: PHP syntax validation — 0 errors across all 27 plugins (600+ files)
Platform: Security audit — all AJAX handlers have check_ajax_referer/check_admin_referer; all REST controllers have permission_callback; no raw SQL injection paths; no unescaped output
Apollo icons: audit and fix of all ri-* icon class references across apollo-core and apollo-users templates
apollo-social: YouTube embed support in ContentParser (youtube.com, youtu.be, shorts)
apollo-social: Template parts refactor (9 partials in templates/parts/)
apollo-social: Compose toolbar media URL buttons (SoundCloud, Spotify, Event, YouTube)
apollo-social: No-image uploads enforcement (server-side validation)
apollo-social: Comment vs Depoimento conditional labels in feed.js
apollo-social: Classifieds safety disclaimer modal with checkbox consent
apollo-social: feed.php renamed to explore.php
apollo-classifieds: New plugin created (frontend marketplace complement to apollo-adverts)
apollo-seo: Full SEO module (Meta, Schema, Sitemap, Metabox, Admin)
apollo-sheets: Bulk editor with DataTables, import/export, REST API
Registry v6.2.0: Added apollo-seo, apollo-sheets, apollo-classifieds entries

apollo-sign v1.2.0: Hand-drawn signature pad (canvas draw/upload/undo/color/PNG export), visual stamp generation (GD), signature image storage, DB v3 (+signature_image_path, stamp_path columns), adapted from _library/signing doc references

security_audit.ajax_nonces: PASS — all wp_ajax_* handlers have check_ajax_referer or check_admin_referer
security_audit.rest_permissions: PASS — all 27 REST controllers have permission_callback + ABSPATH guard
security_audit.sql_injection: PASS — no raw unsanitized queries; interpolated variables verified safe
security_audit.output_escaping: PASS — no echo of unescaped superglobals in templates

$audit.notes: 32 total plugins: 26 in workspace, 6 planned. apollo-social REST uses /feed (not /explore) for API routes.

$GLOBAL_ARCHITECTURE.CRITICAL: apollo-core is MASTER REGISTRY - ALL CPTs, Taxonomies, Meta Keys, Tables defined centrally
$GLOBAL_ARCHITECTURE.CPTs: 10 CPTs with FALLBACK system - if owner plugin not active, core registers
$GLOBAL_ARCHITECTURE.Taxonomies: 13 taxonomies ALL GLOBAL - available to ALL CPTs as BRIDGE
$GLOBAL_ARCHITECTURE.Meta: 100+ meta keys defined centrally with validation
$GLOBAL_ARCHITECTURE.Tables: 22 tables ALL created by apollo-core on activation
$GLOBAL_ARCHITECTURE.RULE: NOTHING restricted to specific plugins - everything is GLOBAL BRIDGE

architecture.principle: Each plugin = ONE focused responsibility. Connected via apollo-core hooks.
architecture.master_registry: apollo-core owns ALL CPT/Taxonomy/Meta/Table definitions - GLOBAL BRIDGE

apollo-core.description: MASTER REGISTRY: ALL CPTs (fallback), ALL Taxonomies (GLOBAL BRIDGE), ALL Meta Keys, ALL Tables, Hooks, Utilities

pages.title: Home/Mural
pages.description: mural-router.php routes guests to page-home.php and logged users to page-mural.php

apollo-login.description: Auth: 7-Step Multi-Step Registration (Social Name, Instagram Integration, Sound Selection), Login, Password Reset, MANDATORY Aptitude Quiz (Pattern, Simon, Ethics, Reaction), WP Hide Ghost (URL Protection - native implementation, no core overwrite), Blank Canvas Templates (zero theme conflicts), Full Security Layer (7G Firewall, Security Headers, WP Hardening, Rate Limiting, Lockout), reCAPTCHA

multi_step_registration.description: 7-step conversational registration flow with trans/queer inclusive language

flow.name: social_name
flow.label: Como você gosta de ser chamade?
flow.description: Trans-inclusive neutral Portuguese - collects preferred social name

flow.name: instagram_username
flow.label: Qual seu @insta?
flow.description: Instagram username - becomes Apollo username AUTOMATICALLY (mandatory equivalence)

flow.name: sounds
flow.label: Escolha de 1 a 5 sons que você curte
flow.description: Sound preferences from GLOBAL BRIDGE taxonomy - visual chip selection UI

flow.name: quiz
flow.label: Quiz de aptidão em 4 etapas: Padrões, Jogo Simon, Ética e Reflexos

instagram_integration.username_enforcement: MANDATORY - Apollo username MUST equal Instagram username
instagram_integration.avatar_method: cURL scraping of public Instagram profile

quiz_system.description: 4-stage aptitude test REQUIRED before account creation

security.description: Site-wide security layer loaded at plugins_loaded priority 1 — runs before any plugin

features: IP blacklist (permanent via wp_options + temporary via transients)
Bad user agent blocking (nikto, masscan, sqlmap, wappalyzer, etc.)
Disables embeds and embed rewrite rules
Blocks direct access to sensitive files (readme.html, wp-config.php, license.txt, debug.log)

wp_hide_ghost.implementation: Hook-based protection - NO core WordPress file modification

filter_urls.description: Prevent WordPress from exposing wp-admin in generated URLs

404_handling.description: Loads theme's 404.php or displays basic 404 HTML

blank_canvas_templates.description: Login/Register pages load ONLY Apollo CSS/JS - zero theme conflicts

_apollo_avatar_attachment_id.description: WordPress attachment ID for downloaded Instagram avatar

rest.description: Create account with multi-step data (social_name, instagram, email, password, sounds, quiz)

apollo-users.description: Users: Roles, Capabilities, Profile page (site.com/id/username), Preferences, Matchmaking, Advanced Fields, Author Protection (Hide My WP native)

rest.description: Radar - Track all new user spots

pages.title: Radar - Track New Spots
pages.description: Discover all users - each user is a new spot to track

shortcodes.description: Radar - User discovery grid tracking all new spots

apollo-membership.description: Membership: Gamification system with achievements, badges, points, ranks — adapted from BadgeOS v3.7.0. Membership is VISUAL BADGE only (not role). 3-pillar architecture: Achievements + Points + Ranks with trigger-based rules engine.
apollo-membership.NOTE: _apollo_membership meta is defined in apollo-users plugin. This plugin adds gamification layer on top.

rest.description: User's earned achievements (requires auth or user_id param)
User's complete membership summary (points, rank, achievements count)
Get/Set membership badge (visual only, not role)

pages.title: Conquistas
pages.description: Achievement gallery with AJAX search, filter, grid/list view, Load More pagination

pages.title: Evidência
pages.description: Open Badge v2 evidence verification page

shortcodes.description: Achievement list with AJAX, search, filter dropdown (all/completed/not-completed), Load More pagination
User's earned achievements with AJAX, search, Load More (requires login unless user_id provided)
User's point balance display (server-side render, no AJAX)
Rank list with AJAX, search, Load More pagination
User's current rank display (requires login unless user_id provided)
Open Badge evidence page with 5-step verification modal (issued_on, issued_by, issued_using, issued_to, expiry_date)

admin_tools.name: System Tools
admin_tools.description: Server info, PHP config, WP info, Apollo Membership info

apollo-events.description: Events CPT: Backend, listings, single event

_event_is_gone.description: Expiration flag set 30min after event ends

rest.description: Events grouped by day for calendar view
Event stats: views, fav, wow, RSVP counts

apollo-djs.description: DJs CPT: Shared across all plugins

apollo-classifieds.description: Classifieds Frontend: Marketplace page complement to apollo-adverts, safety disclaimer modal, AJAX chat init
apollo-classifieds.NOTE: Frontend complement to apollo-adverts. apollo-adverts handles the CPT/REST/meta, apollo-classifieds handles the marketplace template and user-facing features.

cpts.NOTE: Fallback registration only — primary registration is in apollo-core/apollo-adverts

apollo-fav.description: Favorites: Universal fav system for ALL CPTs

apollo-social.description: Social Feed: Activity stream, posts, timeline, embeds (YouTube, SoundCloud, Spotify, Events)

content_parser.description: ContentParser.php - detects and renders embedded media from URLs in posts

features.no_image_uploads: Server-side validation rejects file params, base64, and img tags in POST /feed/post
features.media_url_bar: Compose toolbar with SoundCloud, Spotify, Event, YouTube URL buttons
features.safety_disclaimer: Modal with checkbox consent for classified chat initiation
features.comment_labels: Conditional labels: 'Depoimento' for classified/event CPTs, 'Comentário' for social posts

apollo-groups.description: Groups: Núcleo (work teams) + Comuna (open communities like Orkut). Full BuddyPress bp-groups feature parity.

rest.description: All pending group invitations for current user

apollo-notif.description: Notifications: In-app notifications, preferences, badge counts, Web Push (VAPID/RFC 8030)

_apollo_push_subscriptions.description: Web Push subscriptions (endpoint + p256dh + auth keys)

rest.description: Get VAPID public key for PushManager.subscribe()

apollo-email.description: Email: Templates, Queue, Transactional emails (SEPARATE from notif)

apollo-chat.description: Chat: Premium instant messaging v2.1 — real-time AJAX polling (3s) with BroadcastChannel cross-tab sync, typing indicators (3s debounce), read receipts (sent → delivered → read), file/image/audio/video attachments with drag-drop + paste, voice messages (MediaRecorder), emoji picker (native Unicode), message reactions, message editing & deletion, reply-to (quote) threading, user presence/online status, message search, sound + browser notifications, group conversations, user blocking, message pinning, message forwarding

_message_reply_to.description: ID of message being replied to (threading)

_message_reactions.description: Array of emoji reactions with user IDs

rest.description: List user's threads / Create new thread
Get older messages / Send new message
Load older messages (scroll-up pagination within thread)
Get all pinned messages in thread
Find or create thread by context (classified/event integration)
GIF search via Tenor proxy (keeps API key server-side)

apollo-chat.NOTE: No shortcodes — Chat works via virtual pages (/mensagens) + REST API + AJAX polling. BroadcastChannel enables real-time sync across browser tabs.

features.real_time: AJAX polling every 3s + BroadcastChannel cross-tab sync
features.message_editing: Edit sent messages with edit timestamp

apollo-docs.description: Documents: Full file manager with document lifecycle, versioning, folders, storage, and admin UI

_doc_signers.description: Ordered signer queue — JSON array of {email, user_id, name, sig_id, status, order}

apollo-sign.description: Signatures: ICP-Brasil digital signing with A1 certificates (PKCS#7/CMS), PDF visual placement (PDF.js + interact.js), hand-drawn signature pad (canvas draw/upload/undo/color), visual stamp generation (GD), audit trail, public verification

stamp_path.description: Path to generated visual stamp PNG

rest.description: Sign with PFX certificate (accepts placement coords)
Initiate multi-signer workflow — saves _doc_signers queue, creates first sig record, sends invite email
List platform users for signer dropdown (search param supported)
Get signer queue and live status for a document

sign-placement.js.description: State-machine driven PDF viewer + interactive signature placement (PDF.js + interact.js)

signature-pad.js.description: Hand-drawn signature pad — canvas draw, upload image, undo, clear, color picker, PNG export

sign-placement.css.description: PDF viewer, signature rect overlay, placement modal, toast styles

signature-pad.css.description: Signature pad canvas, toolbar, color picker, toggle, preview styles

coordinate_system.backend: PDF points (72pt/inch), origin bottom-left, Y inverted for signer-php rect

shortcodes.description: Signature pad with ICP-Brasil A1 signing

apollo-gestor.description: Gestor: Event production management — tasks, team, budget, suppliers, timeline, kanban, activity log

apollo-journal.description: Magazine & editorial platform — news grid, NREP auto-codes, custom taxonomies, shortcodes, REST API, mobile-first

apollo-shortcodes.description: Shortcodes: ALL frontend shortcodes registry organized here

rest.description: Global search across all content types

apollo-shortcodes.shortcodes: ALL - This plugin REGISTERS all shortcodes from other plugins

apollo-templates.description: Templates: Page builder canvas, calendar types (01, 02...), PWA templates, all template variations

pages.title: Sobre
pages.description: About Apollo page. Canvas mode, navbar.v1.php

apollo-dashboard.description: Dashboard: User dashboard settings, template definitions, widgets

apollo-hub.description: Hub: Public profile page like Linktree (site.com/hub/username) DIFFERENT from user profile
apollo-hub.NOTE: HUB is public Linktree-style page (/hub/), PROFILE is full page (/id/)

_hub_links.description: Legacy link array (backward compat — migrated to _hub_blocks)

apollo-coauthor.description: Co-Author: Co-author plus system for all CPTs, managed by admin

apollo-mod.description: Moderation: Tab system with control for each WP admin section

apollo-admin.description: Admin Panel: MANDATORY unified admin with tabs for ALL plugins settings

apollo-statistics.description: Statistics: ALL Apollo analytics and stats in one place

apollo-cult.description: Cult/Industry: Hidden industry area. Calendar, save-the-dates, industry organizing

apollo-pwa.description: PWA: Service Workers, Offline support, Web App Manifest

apollo-seo.description: SEO: Meta tags, Open Graph, Schema.org, Sitemap, Title management. Replaces WP defaults. Supports blank canvas templates via apollo/seo/head hook.

rest.description: SEO data for a post (title, description, canonical, og, schema, robots)
SEO data for a taxonomy term

apollo-sheets.description: Sheets: Spreadsheet/table editor with DataTables, import/export (CSV/JSON/HTML), bulk editing, admin UI. Adapted from TablePress patterns.

cpts.NOTE: Data stored as JSON in post_content, options in post meta. Accessed via shortcode, REST, or admin UI only.

apollo-runtime.description: Runtime: Shared runtime services/bootstrap used across Apollo plugins.
apollo-runtime.CRITICAL_RULE: NEVER register meta keys, CPTs, or taxonomies here. ALL registrations MUST go through apollo-core MASTER_REGISTRY. This plugin bootstraps runtime services only.

hooks.listens: apollo/core/initialized (priority 20) — waits for core before loading modules

module_system.description: Loads modules/*/bootstrap.php files automatically after core init

config_files.constants.php: Runtime constant overrides — currently overrides APOLLO_CDN_URL and defines APOLLO_CDN_CORE_JS
config_files.cpts.php: CPT overrides — currently empty (MUST stay empty per CRITICAL_RULE)
config_files.env.php: Environment flags — returns { environment: wp_get_environment_type(), debug: WP_DEBUG }

membership_types.note: Membership != Role. Membership is visual badge via _apollo_membership meta

timeDisplay.STANDARD: MANDATORY across ALL Apollo plugins — no 'ago', no 'atrás', no 'X days ago'
timeDisplay.php_html_function: apollo_time_ago_html( $datetime )  → returns full HTML block (use wp_kses_post())
timeDisplay.FORBIDDEN_REASON: Destroys the compact icon-first standard and breaks CSS targeting via .time-ago/.when-ago

divergences.details: archive-classified.php / single-classified.php / create-classified.php not present in plugin; pages rely on future templates or apollo-classifieds marketplace page.
Templates for achievements/points/ranks (achievements.php, points.php, ranks.php, leaderboard.php, single screens) are not present in apollo-membership; registry pages remain planned.
APOLLO_ALL_ROUTES lists /feed with feed.php; current plugin template is explore.php with routes /explore and /mural. Confirm if /feed rewrite should alias to explore.php or be removed.
Rest base is /locals and rewrite slug is /gps; APOLLO_ALL_ROUTES listed /locs. Registry updated to match code.
